title: Ballistic missile launch detected
title_en: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: It is important that the world is not silent about today's absolutely cynical Russian attack on our people. Spoke today with Alex Stubb, President of Finland. Thank you for your words of sympathy and willingness to help us. Defense against ballistic missiles is impossible without a sufficient number of suitable missiles for the Patriots. This is our biggest priority right now. We discussed which of the partners and how exactly they can help...
description_en: It is important that the world is not silent about today's absolutely cynical Russian attack on our people. Spoke today with Alex Stubb, President of Finland. Thank you for your words of sympathy and willingness to help us. Defense against ballistic missiles is impossible without a sufficient number of suitable missiles for the Patriots. This is our biggest priority right now. We discussed which of the partners and how exactly they can help...
description_uk: Важливо, що світ не мовчить про сьогоднішню абсолютно цинічну російську атаку по наших людях. Говорив сьогодні з Алексом Стуббом, Президентом Фінляндії. Дякую за слова співчуття і готовність нам допомагати. Захищатися від балістичних ракет неможливо без достатньої кількості відповідних ракет для Patriot’ів. Це наш найбільший пріоритет зараз. Обговорили, хто з партнерів і як саме може допомогти....

description: In August, Putin will decide whether to continue the war with a new autumn-winter campaign. Ukraine wants to bring him to negotiations precisely at this moment, - The Economist The Economist writes that the 40-day campaign of strikes announced by Zelensky is an attempt to force the Russian Federation into real negotiations by August. It is then that the Kremlin will decide whether to launch an autumn-winter offensive. The main rate of Ukraine now - strikes...
description_en: In August, Putin will decide whether to continue the war with a new autumn-winter campaign. Ukraine wants to bring him to negotiations precisely at this moment, - The Economist The Economist writes that the 40-day campaign of strikes announced by Zelensky is an attempt to force the Russian Federation into real negotiations by August. It is then that the Kremlin will decide whether to launch an autumn-winter offensive. The main rate of Ukraine now - strikes...
description_uk: В августе путин решит, продолжать ли войну новой осенне-зимней кампанией. Украина хочет подвести его к переговорам именно к этому моменту, - The Economist The Economist пишет, что объявленная Зеленским 40-дневная кампания ударов - это попытка вынудить рф к реальным переговорам до августа. Именно тогда Кремль будет решать, начать ли осенне-зимнее наступление. Главная ставка Украины сейчас - удары...

title: Drone strike
title_en: Drone strike
description: Russian Federation began to expand Alabuga - the main factory for the production of "Shakhedov" on a large scale. OSINT analysts showed new satellite images: the construction of new production workshops on another 340 hectares began on the territory of the SEZ "Alabuga" in Tatarstan. Active installation of the main structures is already underway there. It is in "Alabuga" that the main part of Russian strike drones of the "Gerany" type are produced...
description_en: Russian Federation began to expand Alabuga - the main factory for the production of "Shakhedov" on a large scale. OSINT analysts showed new satellite images: the construction of new production workshops on another 340 hectares began on the territory of the SEZ "Alabuga" in Tatarstan. Active installation of the main structures is already underway there. It is in "Alabuga" that the main part of Russian strike drones of the "Gerany" type are produced...
description_uk: рф начала масштабно расширять "Алабугу" - главный завод по производству "Шахедов" OSINT-аналитики показали свежие спутниковые снимки: на территории ОЭЗ "Алабуга" в Татарстане началось строительство новых производственных цехов еще на 340 гектаров. Сейчас там уже идет активный монтаж основных конструкций. Именно в "Алабуге" выпускают основную часть российских ударных беспилотников типа "Герань"...

Andrii Sybiga emphasized that the recovery of Ukraine opens up significant opportunities for mutually beneficial cooperation with Japanese business, primarily in the energy sector. The minister invited...

description_uk: 🇯🇵 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга у Токіо взяв участь в Українсько-японському бізнес-діалозі з питань енергетики, організованому Японською організацією сприяння розвитку зовнішньої торгівлі (JETRO). Андрій Сибіга наголосив, що відновлення України відкриває значні можливості для взаємовигідної співпраці з японським бізнесом, насамперед в енергетичній сфері. Міністр запросив...

description: Train collision with minibus reported in Ukraine’s northwestern Rivne Oblast. A minibus collided with a train at a crossing in northwestern Rivne Oblast, Ukraine’s state railway operator Ukrzaliznytsia reported on July 2. There are “preliminary reports” of casualties.

Among the targets were the British air base RAF Lakenheath, the French nuclear submarine base Île Longue, as well as facilities in Belgium and the Netherlands where American nuclear weapons are stored. It is assumed that drones could...

description_uk: россия 18 месяцев следила за ядерными объектами Европы с помощью дронов, — The Guardian Аналитики IISS насчитали 144 подозрительных инцидента более чем в десяти странах Европы. Среди целей были британская авиабаза RAF Lakenheath, французская база атомных подлодок Île Longue, а также объекты в Бельгии и Нидерландах, где хранится американское ядерное оружие. Предполагается, что беспилотники могли...

title: Kyiv: 86 injured
title_en: Kyiv: 86 injured
description: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.
description_en: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.
description_uk: Update: Death toll rises to 18, with 86 injured in massive Kyiv attack. At least 18 people were killed and 86 injured after a massive Russian missile and drone attack hit Kyiv overnight on July 2, local authorities reported. Search and rescue operations are ongoing at several sites, including a partially collapsed high-rise residential building in the Darnitskyi District.

title: Kharkiv: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Kharkiv: Attack attack on residential area
description: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian attack continues in Kyiv: rescuers are sorting through rubble, looking for people, and providing assistance. Damage was recorded in more than 20 locations in the city, and mostly these are ordinary residential buildings. An ambulance station, a scientific institute, a hotel, and businesses were also destroyed. As of now, it is known that 13 people, unfortunately, died as a result of this Russian attack. My...
description_en: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian attack continues in Kyiv: rescuers are sorting through rubble, looking for people, and providing assistance. Damage was recorded in more than 20 locations in the city, and mostly these are ordinary residential buildings. An ambulance station, a scientific institute, a hotel, and businesses were also destroyed. As of now, it is known that 13 people, unfortunately, died as a result of this Russian attack. My...
description_uk: У Києві триває ліквідація наслідків російської атаки: рятувальники розбирають завали, шукають людей, надають допомогу. У місті зафіксовані пошкодження на понад 20 локаціях, і переважно це звичайні житлові будинки. Також руйнувань зазнали станція швидкої допомоги, науковий інститут, готель, підприємства. Станом на зараз відомо, що 13 людей, на жаль, загинули від цього російського удару. Мої...
